resources.string: The circular library has no end; the walls bleed tomorrow.

The archive turns beyond the horizon. Prophecies crawl over asylum walls, each cipher shouting over the next. The seer has no eyes now, only channels: a thousand futures, a thousand deaths, a thousand might-have-beens. Blood streams from ruined senses. Truth is too heavy for the spine of reason, but one glimpse of the whole is worth the beautiful collapse.
